reasoning: Task appears to be: produce a concise, neutral summary of the given news report without adding new information.
output: Police are investigating after a gun was fired near Anfield Road Primary School around 09:00 GMT. Pupils and staff at Anfield Road Primary and nearby All Saints Catholic Primary were told to stay indoors while officers examine CCTV and conduct house-to-house inquiries; no injuries have been reported. Witnesses described a white man in a grey hooded top firing at a dark-coloured car, and police said the attack appears targeted. The headteacher said pupils were safe and the day was continuing as normal.
